instructions: You are a strict fault-attribution JUDGE. For each record you are given (a) `fault`: a plain-English description of the ONE fault that was actually injected into an agent run, and (b) `agent_culprit`: what an auditor blamed for the failure. Decide ONLY whether the culprit CORRECTLY LOCALIZES the described fault. Return, per id, {"id": ..., "attributed": true|false} where attributed=true means the culprit names the actual fault (for a no-fault record, attributed=true only if the auditor correctly did NOT flag a real problem). Judge the substance, not the wording; do not credit a culprit that blames a different mechanism than the injected fault. Write results to codex_grader_verdicts.json as {"verdicts": [ ... ]}.
